title: coilonox diluculum
side_effects: Coilonox diluculum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe dizziness, nausea, and stomach irritation due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged exposure can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as an increased risk of seizures in individuals with pre-existing neurological conditions. Additionally, improper use of the Coilonox diluculum plant has been linked to respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma attacks in sensitive individuals. In extreme cases, incorrect dosage or handling can result in life-threatening conditions, such as cardiac arrest or acute organ failure.
